results.title: Vehicle Routing Problem
results.content_text: Official guide describing the basic vehicle-routing model, distance matrices, route-cost callbacks, dimensions, fleet assignments and solution reporting.
results.excerpt: Official guide describing the basic vehicle-routing model, distance matrices, route-cost callbacks, dimensions, fleet assignments and solution reporting.

results.title: Vehicle Routing Problem with Time Windows
results.content_text: Official implementation guide for adding visit time windows, waiting slack and cumulative time dimensions to routing models.
results.excerpt: Official implementation guide for adding visit time windows, waiting slack and cumulative time dimensions to routing models.

results.title: Capacity Constraints
results.content_text: Official guide for capacitated routing, demand callbacks, vehicle capacities and capacity dimensions.
results.excerpt: Official guide for capacitated routing, demand callbacks, vehicle capacities and capacity dimensions.

results.title: Vehicle Routing with Pickups and Deliveries
results.content_text: Official guide for pickup-delivery pairing, same-vehicle constraints and precedence constraints in routing models.
results.excerpt: Official guide for pickup-delivery pairing, same-vehicle constraints and precedence constraints in routing models.

responses.query: dynamic vehicle routing online stochastic requests review

results.title: Solving Large-Scale Dynamic Vehicle Routing Problems with Stochastic Requests
results.content_text: Models dynamic routing with stochastic requests as a multistage problem and combines value approximations with online acceptance and assignment policies on large street-network instances.
results.excerpt: Models dynamic routing with stochastic requests as a multistage problem and combines value approximations with online acceptance and assignment policies on large street-network instances.

results.title: Dynamic Vehicle Routing Problem: A Monte Carlo approach
results.content_text: Uses Monte Carlo generation of unknown future requests and hybrid search to balance solution quality and response time in dynamic delivery routing.
results.excerpt: Uses Monte Carlo generation of unknown future requests and hybrid search to balance solution quality and response time in dynamic delivery routing.

results.title: An Online Approach to Solve the Dynamic Vehicle Routing Problem with Stochastic Trip Requests for Paratransit Services
results.content_text: Formulates dynamic routing with time windows as an online decision problem and uses Monte Carlo tree search with structured action sampling on real service data.
results.excerpt: Formulates dynamic routing with time windows as an online decision problem and uses Monte Carlo tree search with structured action sampling on real service data.

results.title: Dynamic Vehicle Routing Problem with Prompt Confirmation of Advance Requests
results.content_text: Combines rapid insertion-based acceptance with continual route optimization so advance requests can be confirmed while later plans remain improvable.
results.excerpt: Combines rapid insertion-based acceptance with continual route optimization so advance requests can be confirmed while later plans remain improvable.

responses.query: multi depot inventory routing warehouse transportation optimization

results.title: Formulations and algorithms for the multiple depot, fuel-constrained, multiple vehicle routing problem
results.content_text: Presents mixed-integer formulations for multiple depots, vehicles and refueling constraints and evaluates them on extensive instances.
results.excerpt: Presents mixed-integer formulations for multiple depots, vehicles and refueling constraints and evaluates them on extensive instances.

results.title: Improved Approximation Algorithms for the Multiple-Depot Split Delivery Vehicle Routing Problem
results.content_text: Develops approximation algorithms for capacitated multiple-depot routing where customer demand may be split among vehicles.
results.excerpt: Develops approximation algorithms for capacitated multiple-depot routing where customer demand may be split among vehicles.

results.title: The Distributionally Robust Cyclic Inventory Routing Problem
results.content_text: Jointly optimizes cyclic replenishment and routing under distributional demand uncertainty using robust reformulations and branch-and-price.
results.excerpt: Jointly optimizes cyclic replenishment and routing under distributional demand uncertainty using robust reformulations and branch-and-price.

results.title: Optimizing Inventory Routing: A Decision-Focused Learning Approach using Neural Networks
results.content_text: Integrates demand prediction with downstream inventory-routing decisions through decision-focused learning instead of optimizing forecast error alone.
results.excerpt: Integrates demand prediction with downstream inventory-routing decisions through decision-focused learning instead of optimizing forecast error alone.

results.title: An Optimization Model for Scheduling Freight Trains on a Single Rail Track
results.content_text: Integrates freight allocation and train scheduling with release dates, capacities and tardiness objectives using integer models and a scalable heuristic.
results.excerpt: Integrates freight allocation and train scheduling with release dates, capacities and tardiness objectives using integer models and a scalable heuristic.

results.title: Digital Twin-Based Simulation for Predictive Decision-Making in Waterway Logistics
results.content_text: Uses time-sliced digital-twin simulation to compare predictive and reactive freight-routing decisions under uncertain water levels.
results.excerpt: Uses time-sliced digital-twin simulation to compare predictive and reactive freight-routing decisions under uncertain water levels.

results.title: Multi-Depot Multi-Trip Vehicle Routing with Total Completion Time Minimization
results.content_text: Formulates multi-depot multi-trip routing with completion-time objectives and proposes a matheuristic for larger instances.
results.excerpt: Formulates multi-depot multi-trip routing with completion-time objectives and proposes a matheuristic for larger instances.

results.title: Adaptive Large Neighborhood Search for Vehicle Routing Problems with Transshipment Facilities Arising in City Logistics
results.content_text: Designs ALNS operators for routing with urban transshipment facilities, heterogeneous fleets and location-dependent time windows.
results.excerpt: Designs ALNS operators for routing with urban transshipment facilities, heterogeneous fleets and location-dependent time windows.

results.title: Multi-Vehicle Routing Problems with Soft Time Windows: A Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Approach

results.title: Attention, Learn to Solve Routing Problems!

results.excerpt: Uses an attention model trained with policy gradients to learn heuristics for TSP, CVRP and related routing problems.

results.title: Neural Combinatorial Optimization with Reinforcement Learning

results.excerpt: Trains a neural policy by reinforcement learning to construct solutions for combinatorial optimization tasks such as TSP and knapsack.

results.excerpt: Exploits multiple symmetric optima to stabilize policy-gradient training for TSP, CVRP and knapsack.

results.title: Leader Reward for POMO-Based Neural Combinatorial Optimization
